symptoms: PR body includes CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) involving parser/terror during ddl tests.
failure_signature: PR body includes CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) involving parser/terror during ddl tests.
root_cause_explanation: A race detector failure was triggered around parser/terror error handling during DDL tests: constructing a new error via Class().New could race on shared internal maps/state. The fix switches to Class().Synthesize when rewriting cancelled DDL job errors, avoiding the shared map mutation/read race observed under concurrent execution.
fix_pattern: Avoid terror error construction races by using Class().Synthesize (instead of Class().New) when rewriting cancelled DDL job errors.

evidence: evidence: PR body includes CI race detector trace (WARNING: DATA RACE) involving parser/terror during ddl tests.
evidence: diff switches terror Class().New(...) to Class().Synthesize(...) when rewriting cancelled DDL job error, avoiding the data race (ddl/ddl.go).
